name: Merchants Guild
description: A powerful trade organization controlling commerce in major cities.

name: City Guard
description: The town's law enforcement, maintaining order and collecting taxes.

name: Thieves Guild
description: A shadowy criminal syndicate operating in the city's underbelly.

name: Mages Circle
description: An order of arcane scholars dedicated to the study and regulation of magic.

name: Noble Houses
description: The aristocratic families who hold political power and land ownership.

name: Adventurers Guild
description: A loose organization of mercenaries, explorers, and monster hunters.

name: Druids Circle
description: Ancient keepers of the natural balance, distrustful of urban expansion.
